call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Fine, I guess. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm looking at consolidating some debt.  What are the terms like? Agent: Absolutely. The loan term is flexible, from 2 to 5 years.  We can tailor it to your monthly budget.  What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I don't know, maybe around $200? Agent: Okay, let me run some numbers... With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $198.  That includes the principal and interest.  There's a small origination fee of 1%, so $100. Customer: Hmm, okay. That sounds…reasonable. Agent: Excellent!  We can get the paperwork started right away.  Do you have a valid driver's license and proof of income handy? Customer: Yeah, I think so. Agent: Fantastic. Let's get this done for you.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Credit Solutions. We have a special offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and a lower APR after the introductory period. Customer: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card, especially with that high of an interest rate.  I'm not interested.  Don't call me again. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you to us.  He mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. Customer: Oh, yeah, Michael! Hi. I am thinking about it, actually. I want to renovate my bathroom. Agent: That's fantastic! We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  What's the scope of the renovation? Customer: It's a full gut job, new tile, everything.  I'm estimating around $25,000 total. Agent: Okay, so a $20,000 loan would cover a significant portion. We can offer terms from 3 to 7 years.  What monthly payment feels comfortable? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $350. Agent: Let me see… with a 7-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $304. There's a 2% origination fee, so $400. Customer: Hmm, $400 is a bit steep. Is there any way to waive that? Agent: Let me speak with my supervisor… *brief hold*… Okay, I can offer to reduce the origination fee to $200 as a one-time courtesy. Customer: Okay, that's better.  Let's do it. Agent: Wonderful! I'll just need some information to verify your identity and get the paperwork started.

Agent: Hello Mr. Rodriguez? This is Lisa from Credit Solutions. We're offering a fantastic… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested!  Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $7,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%. Customer: 17.99?! You're joking, right? This is ridiculous! I want my number removed from your list!  I'm reporting you to the Do Not Call Registry! Agent: Sir, please… Customer: No, you please! *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan on our website. How can I help you today? Customer: Yes, hello. I'm thinking about taking out a loan to pay for my daughter's wedding. Agent: Oh, congratulations! That's wonderful. We're pre-approving you for a $12,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%.  How much are you looking to borrow? Customer: I think $12,000 should cover most of it.  What are the repayment options? Agent: We have terms from 2 to 5 years.  A 5-year term would result in a monthly payment of around $232. There's a 1.5% origination fee, so $180. Customer: Okay, that sounds manageable. I'd like to think about it a little more. Agent: Absolutely. I can email you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and a link to our online application. Would that be helpful? Customer: Yes, please. That would be great. Agent: Perfect. I'll send that over right away.  Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Agent: Hi David, this is Mark from Credit Solutions. I understand you were referred by our partner, Travel Rewards.  Are you looking for a new credit card? Customer: Yeah, I am. I travel a lot for work. Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 14.99%. This card offers 2x points on travel and dining. Customer: 14.99% is a little high, isn't it? What's the annual fee? Agent: The annual fee is $99. However, you'll earn enough points with your travel spending to easily offset that fee.  We also have a 0% introductory APR for the first 6 months. Customer: Hmm, okay. What's the credit limit? Agent: $10,000, as I mentioned.  And we can potentially increase that after 6 months of responsible use. Customer: Alright, sounds good. Let's go ahead and apply. Agent: Fantastic! I just need a few details to verify your identity and get the application started.  Can I confirm your date of birth?

Agent: Hello Mrs. Wilson? This is David from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… Customer: (Interrupting) What? Speak up, dear. I didn't quite catch that. Agent: I said, we're offering a special Personal Loan. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at 16.49%. Customer: 16.49? What does that even mean? Is that a good rate? I'm so confused. Agent: It's… uh… it's the interest rate, ma'am. Customer: Interest rate? Oh dear. I don't think I need a loan. Thank you. *click*

Agent: Hi Anthony, this is Sarah from Credit Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. Customer: Yeah, I did. I'm looking for a card with good rewards. Agent: Perfect! We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 13.99%. This card offers 3x points on all purchases and travel insurance. Customer: 3x points? That's pretty good. What's the annual fee? Agent: The annual fee is $150, but you'll earn enough points to more than cover that, especially with your spending habits.  We also offer a balance transfer option with a low introductory rate. Customer: Balance transfer? I have about $5,000 in debt on another card. Agent: Excellent! We can transfer that balance to your new card and you'll save a significant amount on interest.  The introductory rate is 0% for the first 12 months. Customer: Wow, that sounds amazing.  What's the process like? Agent: It's very simple. I just need to verify a few details and then we can proceed with the application.  Do you have your social security number handy? Customer: Yes, I do. Let's do it.

Agent: Hi Linda, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a personal loan. Your friend, Susan, recommended us. Customer: Oh, hi. Yes, I was thinking about getting a loan to consolidate some bills. Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $7,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 11.99%. What kind of bills are you looking to consolidate? Customer: Mostly credit card debt. It's just getting out of hand. Agent: I understand. A personal loan can be a great way to simplify your payments and save on interest. We offer terms from 2 to 5 years. A 5-year term would result in a monthly payment of around $148. There's a 2.5% origination fee, so $175. Customer: Hmm, that sounds… okay. I need to talk it over with my husband. Agent: Absolutely. I can email you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and a link to our online application. Would that be helpful? Customer: Yes, please. That would be great. Agent: Perfect. I'll send that over right away.  Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions.  What's your email address?

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Sarah from Credit Solutions. We're offering a special… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, I'm unemployed. I don't need a credit card. Where did you even get my number? I'm not interested. *click*
